creator: spam@rm-rf.kiev.ua
text:
On Sat, Aug 02, 2008 at 04:52:58PM +0000, jadawin@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [patch] games/lordsawar update to 0.1.0
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: jadawin
> State-Changed-When: Sat Aug 2 16:52:41 UTC 2008
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Hi,
> 
> === Checking filesystem state after all packages deleted
> ================================================================ list of
> extra files and directories in / (not present on clean system but
> present after everything was deinstalled) 46069103        4 drwxr-xr-x
> 3 root             wheel                 512 Aug  2 16:19
> usr/local/share/gnome 46069104        4 drwxr-xr-x    3 root
> wheel                 512 Aug  2 16:19 usr/local/share/gnome/help
> 46069105        4 drwxr-xr-x    3 root             wheel
> 512 Aug  2 16:19 usr/local/share/gnome/help/lordsawar 46069106        4
> drwxr-xr-x    2 root             wheel                 512 Aug  2 16:19
> usr/local/share/gnome/help/lordsawar/C 46069107        8 -r--r--r--    1
> root             wheel                3672 Aug  2 16:19
> usr/local/share/gnome/help/lordsawar/C/legal.xml 46069108       16
> -r--r--r--    1 root             wheel                7718 Aug  2 16:19
> usr/local/share/gnome/help/lordsawar/C/lordsawar.xml
> 
> can you fix it please?  Thanks!
Yes. Sorry about that.
